SHORT NAME: MORTALITIES 
LONG NAME: MORTALITIES 
TYPE:

SOURCE: 
AHCAH facility-submitted data

COMMENT: 
Occasionally a negative value may appear in a data submission; theses are corrections to prior data. 
Data users should interpret the negative values to mean zero (no mortalities). 
The data submission period represents the data submission
